source_policy: Risk windows are deterministic policy rules applied to source-backed economic events. They are not predictions.

policies.label: market_holiday
policies.action: No paper fills or new paper entries on the closed-market date.

policies.label: nonfarm_payroll
policies.action: Reduce discretionary new exposure and require explicit revalidation before and after payrolls.

policies.label: fomc
policies.action: Avoid leverage and large new directional exposure around the rate decision.
